title: 9 yummy herbal teas for kids with colds
description: Sambucus nigra teas, made from the flowers of the elder tree, have been used for centuries to help alleviate cold and flu symptoms. The key to its effectiveness lies in its rich content of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenes. These constituents work together to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off viral infections.
